---
title: "Henriette Elizabeth De Witt"
---

## Henriette Elizabeth De Witt

**Dates:** (1829-1908)

**Maiden name:** (Guizot)

### Description

novelist and translator

### Biography

Eldest daughter of the French politician Francois Guizot (1787-1874), she married (1850) Conrad de Witt (1824-1909). [<i>Lettres à sa fille Henriette</i>]

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 14th [1895]
- Letter from July 14th 1887
- Letter from March 10th 1879
- Letter from Jany 15th 1879
- Letter from May 7, 1874.
- Letter from July 1st 1872
- Letter from May 19th [1871]
- Letter from Decr 12th 1870
- Letter from Decr 9th 1870
- Letter from Aug 28th [1869]
- Letter from August 13. [1869]
- Letter from August 12. [1869]
- Letter from August 11. [1869]
- Letter from August 10. [1869]
- Letter from August 9. [1869]
- Letter from August 6. [1869]
- Letter from August 5 [1869]
- Letter from February 28, 1869
- Letter from Febry 4 [1869[[footnote:2]]]
- Letter from Oct 26th 1868

*... and 12 more letters*

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
